signals.headline: ETH Hits $6K on Pectra Upgrade Final Testing & Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence** [3]
signals.raw:
ETH Hits $6K on Pectra Upgrade Final Testing & Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence** [3]

Ethereum's price has surged to $6K as of April 18, 2026, driven by the **Pectra (Prague-Electra) Upgrade** entering its final testing phase, boosting wallet abstraction and validator efficiency, alongside all-time high Spot Ethereum ETF inflows and Layer 2 TVL milestones like Base and Arbitrum[3]. signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation confirmed at 2.2% (up from 2.0%, below 2.4% forecast)** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][3]

This data, from Statistics Korea and reported today via Trading Economics, marks the latest official release amid Middle East-driven oil shocks; Bank of Korea held rates at 2.5% last week (6th meeting) while raising its 2026 inflation outlook to 2.2% from 2.1%[1]
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
